description:
Fork of morphe-patches v1.28.0 with Block playlist auto-next patch. Based on [1.28.0](https://github.com/MorpheApp/morphe-patches/compare/v1.27.0...v1.28.0) upstream.

### Fork additions
* **YouTube - Block playlist auto-next:** Adds an option to block automatic navigation to the next video in playlists and mixes, with a toggle button in the player overlay.

### Upstream changes (v1.28.0)
* **YouTube - Hide ads:** Hide new type of product sticker
* **YouTube - Hide layout components:** Hide new type of community post
* **YouTube - Open channel of live avatar:** Multiple fixes for localizations and video player
* **YouTube - PlayerOverlayButton:** Fix race condition and margin issues
* **YouTube Music:** Add experimental support for 9.19.50
* **YouTube:** Add experimental support for 21.20.400
* Simplify settings summary text
* Add miscellaneous link handling preference
